title: Company Codex onboarding guide for plan dashboard
interpretedGoal: Record the instructions for allowing a company Codex agent to access and write to the shared plan dashboard repository.
privacyNotes: This is a work-agent operating guide. It contains no credentials or company secrets.

tasks.title: Tell company Codex to read agent protocol documents
tasks.notes: Primary references are docs/AGENT_PROTOCOL.md and docs/DATA_SCHEMA.md. Also read docs/GIT_SYNC_WORKFLOW.md and docs/AGENT_PROMPT_TEMPLATE.md.

tasks.title: Use synced plan storage for normal plan records
tasks.notes: When the user says 'plan에 저장해줘', create or update data/plans/{context}/{agent}/{plan-id}.json, update data/plans-index.json, validate, commit, pull --rebase, and push.

tasks.title: Use local-only storage when requested
tasks.notes: When the user says 'local plan에 저장해줘', use data/local-plans/{context}/{agent}/ and data/local-plans-index.json. Do not push local-only records.

tasks.title: Apply work privacy rules
tasks.notes: For company work, use context: work and avoid credentials, tokens, customer-identifying data, internal URLs, and raw confidential text.

updates.message: Saved company Codex setup and operating instructions as a plan record.
